steps.title: Identify the sample proportion
steps.content:
In the sample of 60 people, 9 preferred mango. The sample proportion is:
$$\frac{9}{60} = 0.15$$

steps.title: Apply the proportion to estimate the population
steps.content:
To estimate how many people in the entire town would prefer mango, multiply the sample proportion by the total population:
$$0.15 \times 16,240 = 2,436$$
This is closest to 2,400 among the answer choices. That matches the correct answer - B is correct.
